user.title: Doordeer Smart Intercom
user.description: Enter your doordeer device details. The RC4 key is obtained from doordeer smart Inc.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to device. Check the IP address and that the device is on your LAN.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check username, password, and RC4 key.
error.invalid_rc4_key: RC4 key is invalid. Contact doordeer smart Inc for your key.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the HA logs.
